_request_preview: [turn-1] If I buy the orthodontia rider today, when does braces coverage start?
content: The Orthodontia Rider has a **12-month waiting period** from the rider purchase date before orthodontic services are covered (Administration — Waiting Periods). Once active, braces and orthodontic treatment are covered at 50% coinsurance up to a $2,000 lifetime maximum (Administration — Riders).
